mapper.sql: session_id, gateway_id, host_ip, active, timeout_seconds, last_access_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_session (session_id, gateway_id, host_ip, active, timeout_seconds, last_access_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{gatewayId}, #{hostIp}, COALESCE(#{active}, 1), #{timeoutSeconds}, #{lastAccessTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM mcp_session WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM mcp_session WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId} ORDER BY last_access_time DESC

SELECT
FROM mcp_session WHERE host_ip = #{hostIp} AND active = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mcp_session WHERE active = 1

SELECT
FROM mcp_session ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM mcp_session WHERE active = 0 OR ( timeout_seconds > 0 AND last_access_time IS NOT NULL AND last_access_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL timeout_seconds SECOND) )
